notes: Obsidian is volcanic glass formed when felsic lava cools rapidly enough to bypass crystallisation — naturally abundant on the flanks of active volcanoes and ubiquitous as a byproduct of the Magma Tap 5 m (which force-cools lava against its turbine wall). Biomes first-pass: any volcanic planet/biome the game exposes. Forward-looking: obsidian is a plausible aggregate for Stone & Concrete's Cement chain (silica-rich) and a plausible raw feedstock for a future Glass mod. v0.1 is declarative-only on both fronts — no sibling mod currently references obsidian.

resources.description: Dense volcanic glass. Mineable directly from obsidian deposits near volcanic flanks, or harvested automatically as a byproduct of the Magma Tap 5 m. Not refinable on its own in v0.1 — exists as a forward-hook material for Stone & Concrete (silica-rich aggregate candidate) and a hypothetical future Glass mod.
